name: policy-track-rejection-parity
description: POST /policy/track rejection-reason byte-parity across BOTH backends. The path validator (Python validate_path / Node validatePolicyPath) rejects absolute, traversal, control-char (the YAML newline-injection vector), and leading-backslash paths with identical reason strings and preserves partial-accept (the one valid path is added). Distinct paths → no dedup rejections → rejected[] is validation failures in input order on both backends.
